_comment: The shape of config.json. You do NOT need to fill this in by hand — install.ps1 detects everything below and writes config.json for you. Copy this only if you want to configure it manually.
_null_fields: device / whisperBin / whisperModel are null because they are different on every machine. The plugin refuses to use them until they are set, rather than guessing.
_port: Must match the hook URLs in .claude/settings.json. Avoid 8787 — WSL's port relay commonly squats on it.
_approvalTimeoutMs: How long a key may stay lit waiting for you. MUST be lower than the hook timeout in .claude/settings.json, or Claude Code gives up first and you get no fallback prompt.
_gateTools: Tools that require a physical key press. Everything else follows the normal permission flow. Start narrow — gating Read would light the deck constantly.
_voice_mode: "local" = ffmpeg records, whisper.cpp transcribes, the text is pasted into the composer. THE ONLY MODE THAT SPEAKS CHINESE — Claude Code's built-in dictation is English-only and rejects zh-CN outright. Audio never leaves the machine. || "gui" = Claude Code Desktop's own dictation button, toggled via UI Automation (lib/mic.ps1); the desktop app has NO keyboard shortcut for the mic. English only. || "cli" = terminal Claude Code: taps `key` at the focused window, needs /voice tap. English only.
_voice_device: ffmpeg dshow device — machine-specific, detected by install.ps1. To find it yourself: `ffmpeg -list_devices true -f dshow -i dummy`. PREFER the @device_cm_ GUID over the friendly name: friendly names are often non-ASCII and get mangled crossing shell boundaries. The backslash must be escaped as \\ in JSON. Looks like: audio=@device_cm_{GUID}\\wave_{GUID}
_voice_whisper: whisperBin/whisperModel: paths to an existing whisper.cpp build — machine-specific, detected by install.ps1. large-v3-turbo is a good speed/quality balance for Chinese. `threads` matters: whisper defaults to 4 no matter how many cores you have.
_voice_autoSubmit: true sends the prompt straight after pasting. false leaves it in the composer so you can read it first — recommended, since STT gets names and code terms wrong.
_voice_key: cli mode only. SendKeys syntax, must match voice:pushToTalk. Space = "{SPACE}"; ctrl+shift+v = "^+v".
